info.name: 07-RideNearby
info.description:
Integration test for GET /{driverId}/nearby.
Setup: registers 5 drivers at origin_lat/lon + 5 riders who each do a search from the same origin.
Asserts: nearbyDriverCount >= 4 (other 4 drivers visible to driver1), nearbyCustomerCount >= 5.

exec: // Generate random identifiers ONCE per collection run
function rPhone(prefix) { return prefix + Math.floor(100000000 + Math.random() * 899999999); }
console.log('Generated test identifiers for 5 drivers + 1 rider');
